category_title: Desktop stapler with hinged top arm
prompt: A full-strip desktop stapler with a steel base, a long hinged top arm, an internal staple magazine, and a rear spring follower tab. The upper arm and magazine body are carried as one supported assembly from a rear horizontal revolute hinge above the base, the follower tab slides prismatically along the magazine channel, and the small clincher plate under the nose rotates on its own central pivot to switch between stapling modes. Keep the tool compact and believable for everyday office use at desk scale.
label: Full strip stapler with follower and clincher

category_title: Desktop stapler with hinged top arm
prompt: A compact half-strip stapler with a molded base, a rounded top handle, a short staple track, and a sliding paper stop on the deck ahead of the throat. The top handle rotates on a rear horizontal revolute hinge, the staple follower moves prismatically inside the upper track, and the paper stop slides prismatically along the base to set insertion depth. Small office-tool scale.
label: Compact stapler with paper stop

category_title: Desktop stapler with hinged top arm
prompt: A heavy-duty long-reach desktop stapler with an elongated base, a tall rear hinge tower, a long upper lever, and a front nose over a deep throat. The lever and staple rail rotate together on a rear horizontal revolute hinge, the rear loading follower slides prismatically along the rail, and the reversible anvil plate beneath the nose rotates on a small pivot in the base. The long throat and supported hinge structure should read as a real office machine rather than a toy.
label: Long reach stapler with reversible anvil

category_title: Desktop stapler with hinged top arm
prompt: A metal desktop stapler with a low rectangular base, a flat top arm, a slide-out front-loading staple tray, and a rear release latch. The top arm rotates on a rear hinge above the base, the staple tray slides prismatically out from the front of the upper body on its guide rails, and the rear release latch moves prismatically into the housing to free the tray. Compact desk scale.
label: Front loading stapler with release latch

category_title: Desktop stapler with hinged top arm
prompt: A premium desktop stapler with a die-cast base, a broad upper arm, a rear magazine follower, and a rotating front anvil for open and closed clinch. The upper arm pivots on a horizontal rear hinge, the follower block translates prismatically inside the staple channel, and the front anvil turns on a small vertical pivot under the stapling nose. Keep the silhouette dense and practical with clear mechanical support between base, hinge, and arm.
label: Die cast stapler with rotating anvil

category_title: Digital multimeter with tilt stand and rotary selector
prompt: A handheld digital multimeter with a rubberized outer bumper, a large central rotary selector, a folding rear tilt stand, and four rectangular function buttons under the display. The selector dial rotates continuously about its center axis, the rear stand rotates outward on a lower horizontal revolute hinge, and each visible front-panel button is a separate small prismatic push button. Handheld electrician-tool scale.

category_title: Digital multimeter with tilt stand and rotary selector
prompt: A rugged autoranging digital multimeter with a boxy main body, a broad LCD bezel, a central range dial, and a rear kickstand with a shallow angle stop. The range dial rotates continuously on the front face, the kickstand hinges from the lower back of the case, and the hold, min-max, and backlight buttons each move independently as prismatic push controls below the screen. category_title: Digital multimeter with tilt stand and rotary selector

The selector knob rotates continuously about its own axis, the long rear stand rotates on two matched lower pivots as one rigid support, and each soft key is an independent small prismatic push control. category_title: Digital multimeter with tilt stand and rotary selector
